section_miscategorizations.text: A nurse will obtain an X-ray of the right shoulder.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The X-ray of the right shoulder is framed as an order to be carried out (a future diagnostic procedure), which belongs in the Plan section. However, the wording 'will obtain' could be misread as already-completed, which would make it observational data. To avoid misleading readers about timing, it should be clearly ordered as a future action in P or, if already done, clearly documented in O. As written, it is ambiguous and risks being interpreted as an existing result in the wrong section.
